content:
# IBM Carbon Design System - Overview

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: dashboard empty state, admin list with no data, first run, no search results
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://v10.carbondesignsystem.com/patterns/empty-states-pattern/

Visual traits:
- calm
- explanatory
- action-oriented
- supportive

Use when:
- dashboard empty state
- admin list with no data
- first run
- no search results

Avoid when:
- hard error
- loading state
- success confirmation

AI summary: Use Carbon empty-state patterns to explain missing data, distinguish the cause, and offer a clear next action without making the user feel blocked or blamed.

# IBM Carbon Design System - Layout Rules

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: dashboard empty state, admin list with no data, first run, no search results
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://v10.carbondesignsystem.com/patterns/empty-states-pattern/

- Explain why content is missing and what normally appears there.
- Provide a next action when the user can recover or start.
- Keep the empty state visually subordinate to the surrounding product shell.

AI summary: Use Carbon empty-state patterns to explain missing data, distinguish the cause, and offer a clear next action without making the user feel blocked or blamed.

# IBM Carbon Design System - Component Patterns

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: dashboard empty state, admin list with no data, first run, no search results
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://v10.carbondesignsystem.com/patterns/empty-states-pattern/

- illustration
- heading
- body explanation
- primary action
- secondary link

AI summary: Use Carbon empty-state patterns to explain missing data, distinguish the cause, and offer a clear next action without making the user feel blocked or blamed.

# IBM Carbon Design System - Interaction States

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: dashboard empty state, admin list with no data, first run, no search results
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://v10.carbondesignsystem.com/patterns/empty-states-pattern/

- first use
- no results
- permission-limited
- cleared data

AI summary: Use Carbon empty-state patterns to explain missing data, distinguish the cause, and offer a clear next action without making the user feel blocked or blamed.

# IBM Carbon Design System - Accessibility Notes

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: dashboard empty state, admin list with no data, first run, no search results
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://v10.carbondesignsystem.com/patterns/empty-states-pattern/

- Do not rely on illustration alone to communicate the state.
- Make the action button text specific and reachable by keyboard.

AI summary: Use Carbon empty-state patterns to explain missing data, distinguish the cause, and offer a clear next action without making the user feel blocked or blamed.

# IBM Carbon Design System - Implementation Hints

Page type: empty_state
Use cases: dashboard empty state, admin list with no data, first run, no search results
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://v10.carbondesignsystem.com/patterns/empty-states-pattern/

- Use empty states as product guidance, not just decoration.
- Differentiate empty because new, empty because filtered, and empty because error.

AI summary: Use Carbon empty-state patterns to explain missing data, distinguish the cause, and offer a clear next action without making the user feel blocked or blamed.
